full_text:
Zhang Cheng (Zhongsi) 張承 (仲嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Cheng (張承), styledZhongsi (仲嗣), was born in Pengcheng. Friend of Zhuge Jin among others. Sent with Sun Shao to Guangling to capture Huaiyang. Zhang Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
